archetypes.label: Heavy sleeper

chill-evening.whyItFits: It lands on the relaxed, calm head, happy and heavy body effect you're after.
chill-evening.riskNotes: You flagged harsh smoke on past pickups — that comes down to freshness, packaging date and storage rather than the strain itself. The same strain can be excellent from one grower and flat from another, so batch quality and cure still decide the experience. This is a sensory match, not a guarantee.
chill-evening.explanation: GG4 lands at 47% — a risky for your profile. There is some overlap with your taste, but enough friction that it could genuinely go either way.

The same strain can be excellent from one grower and flat from another, so batch quality and cure still decide the experience. This is a sensory match, not a guarantee.
daytime-creative.explanation: GG4 lands at 17% — a avoid for your profile. On sensory grounds it pulls away from what you've told us you enjoy, so it is likely a poor use of your money.
